content.en:
"This calling should have something to do with my ultimate body, it comes from the summoning of the ultimate body. "

Ye Tian muttered.

It seemed that he could follow the call and go straight into an unknown place.

He didn't go over, though.

After all, he didn't know anything about all this.

He went to inquire about Yinduo Jizun, but Yinduo Jizun's strength was limited and he didn't understand this matter at all.

So, Ye Tian came to consult the Mitian Supreme Venerable on this day.

The Heavenly Extreme Venerable is the first-level Ultimate Realm Lord, if he doesn't even know about it, then no one knows about it.

subsequently

Ye Tian came to Mitian Jizun~, and came to ask him in person.

......

"Mi Tian Ji Venerable, I came to you because I want to ask you something-. Ye Tian said.

The Heavenly Supreme Venerable was a little curious, "The Ten Thousand Law Supreme Venerable, please-say." "

Ye Tian asked, "I wonder if the Mitian Extreme Venerable knows why after the entry of the Ultimate Body, there is a sense of summoning, and it seems that he can go to an unknown place." "

"The Ultimate Body!"

The Heavenly Extreme Venerable was shocked and said, "Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, could it be that you have already entered the ultimate body?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian admitted it, he wanted to consult the Mitian Extreme Venerable, so he naturally had to tell the truth.

"I'm so envious!"

Mi Tian Ji Zun Dao.

He dreamed of condensing the ultimate body, but it was too difficult, he didn't even create an ultimate body method, and he didn't even have the prototype of the ultimate body.

As a result, the latecomers came to the top and Ye Tian actually condensed the ultimate body.

Before, when Ye Tian had not yet condensed the ultimate body, he was comparable to the first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord, and now his strength is probably above him.

"Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, I really know the question you asked!" "Mitian Supreme Venerable said: "The sense of summoning generated by the entrance to the Ultimate Body is a summoning from the Ultimate Land. "

"The ultimate place?

Ye Tian was very curious.

Mi Tian Ji Zun said: "What is the specific place of the ultimate place, you ask me, I don't know, after all, I haven't been to it either." But the Dimensional Sea has existed for too long, and before I was born, or even before the Multidimensional Realm was born, there were many Ultimate Realm Masters. Some of them have cultivated to an extremely high realm, and there are many opportunities in the Sea of Dimensions at the beginning, and many Ultimate Realm Masters have condensed their ultimate bodies, and then entered the ultimate land. "

"Since this Infinite Era, there have been quite a few existences that have entered the Ultimate Land, but the era is too long, and now many Ultimate Realm Masters of the Dimensional Sea do not know about it. And since I was born, there has only been one Ultimate Realm Lord in the Dimension Sea who has gone to the Ultimate Land, and that is called Nirvana Extreme Venerable. And now, there's one more of you. However, I recommend that you don't go for the time being, because it will be difficult to come back after going to the existence of the ultimate place. "

Having a hard time coming back?

Ye Tian was puzzled, "Isn't it okay to keep a doppelganger or an incarnation?"

"No!" Mi Tian Jizun shook his head, "If it is enough to leave a clone or an avatar, we will not be ignorant of the ultimate place." If anyone has ever come back, there is only one, one of the Ultimate Masters of the Ultimate Land, the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable! The Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable is a very ancient Ultimate Realm Lord, and then he broke through in the Ultimate Land and reached the Ultimate Extreme Honor, which is also the ultimate above the Ultimate Realm Lord. After that, there was no more road. The Ultimate Extreme Venerable has returned, and has left behind a legacy and opportunity. "

"I don't know the inheritance opportunity left by this Heavenly Extreme Venerable?"

Ye Tian wanted to see it.

"It's gone!" Mitian Extreme Venerable said helplessly: "Because of this incident, a great war broke out in the Dimensional Sea, and in the end, this opportunity was brought into the ultimate place by another Ultimate Realm Lord. Since then, the Ultimate Realm Lord has never returned. If you are to enter the Ultimate Place, all your clones or avatars will be sucked into the Ultimate Land. If you want to come out, unless you can break through to the ultimate supreme, you can break the shackles of the ultimate place and come out easily. "

"Thank you for the reminder!"

Ye Tian hurriedly thanked.

Otherwise, he would recklessly enter the ultimate place, but he would not be able to see his relatives, and he would not be able to control what happened here.

Broken rain, Ye Tian and Mitian Jizun chatted for a while before leaving.

......

"I can't enter the Ultimate Land yet, and when I increase my strength more, or even let the human race have enough land for self-preservation, I will consider whether to enter the Ultimate Land when the time comes. "

Ye Tian muttered.

For example, he had to first train his son to the first-level Ultimate Realm Lord combat power, and then cultivate a few more Ultimate Realm Masters, so that the safety of the human race could be guaranteed.

The years that followed.

While Ye Tian was improving his strength, he was cultivating his son Ye Xingchen, and the Pearl of the Eternal Night had already been given to his son Ye Xingchen.

After all, now that he had that black giant pillar and the fragments of the Mishu Disk, even if he lacked the Pearl of Eternal Night, the efficiency of improving the Ultimate Rule would not be much slower.

Besides, the Orb of the Eternal Night had just as good an effect on him.

With the Pearl of Eternal Night, it has an excellent effect in assisting in improving the ultimate rules, and Ye Xingchen's ultimate rule realm has improved a lot faster.

Coupled with Ye Tian's continuous provision of various resources, Ye Xingchen could quickly improve his strength as long as he practiced hard.

It's just that compared with Ye Tian's progress, Ye Xingchen's progress is not worth mentioning.

......

After condensing the Ultimate Body, Ye Tian's progress in the Ultimate Ultimate Rule was extremely fast, and he also devoted all his strength to improving the Ultimate Ultimate Rule.

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, hundreds of billions of domain yuan years have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's Ultimate Darkness Ultimate Rule has reached the true three hundred and sixty-fifth level, which is also the limit of the Ultimate Darkness Ultimate Rule.

With the consummation of the Darkness Ultimate Rule, Ye Tian's Darkest Ultimate Body has also improved by a section, his body has become stronger, and his strength has also improved a lot.

For the time being, he can't continue to improve in the Darkest Ultimate System, and can only improve in other aspects.

As a result, Ye Tian began to improve the Extreme Rules of the Abyssal Star.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Abyss Ultimate's Rule had finally been raised to the 365th Realm, and his Abystalph Ultimate's Body had also reached the level of perfect control, and his strength was very strong.

However, he still hasn't mastered the Ultimate Body Method of Yuanxing, and if he wants to create it, there is no way.

"The black giant pillar in the Ultimate Dark Domain may be left by the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, maybe there are also things left by the Ultimate Supreme Venerable in the Sea of Dimensions, but they don't know it. "

Ye Tian thought so.
